label: kubectl
description: Keep kubectl status, rollout and error output. Skips logs/exec/top (arbitrary content) and structured -o json/yaml output.

tests.name: pod listing with failure
tests.input:
NAME       READY   STATUS             RESTARTS   AGE
api-7d8    1/1     Running            0          2h
web-2c4    0/1     CrashLoopBackOff   5          12m
db-9f1     1/1     Running            0          2h
tests.expected:
NAME       READY   STATUS             RESTARTS   AGE
web-2c4    0/1     CrashLoopBackOff   5          12m

tests.name: rollout success
tests.input:
Waiting for deployment "api" rollout to finish: 0 of 3 updated replicas are available...
Waiting for deployment "api" rollout to finish: 1 of 3 updated replicas are available...
deployment "api" successfully rolled out

tests.name: skips kubectl logs (arbitrary application output)
tests.input:
2026-05-28T10:00:00 INFO request handled
2026-05-28T10:00:01 INFO request handled
tests.expected:
2026-05-28T10:00:00 INFO request handled
2026-05-28T10:00:01 INFO request handled

tests.name: skips json output (would corrupt structured data)
